meta.siteTitle: CHIC — Wooden Expert | Custom Wood Products Manufacturer in China
meta.siteDescription: CHIC wooden expert — a leading custom wooden box manufacturer in China. Hinged, sliding, magnetic and locked boxes in paulownia, pine, bamboo, acacia and walnut.

footer.newsletterTitle: Get our catalog & new product updates
footer.brandBlurb: Xiamen Chic Homeware Co.,Ltd. is a custom wooden box manufacturer with our 15,000 m² factory in Cao County, Shandong and our sales & design office in Xiamen, Fujian. We help global brands and retailers in 60+ countries bring premium wooden packaging and storage products to market — at scale, with bench-grade craftsmanship.
footer.newsletterConsent: By subscribing, you agree to our <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>. We send 1-2 emails per month and you can unsubscribe anytime.

cookie.message: We use cookies to power our chat widget and to remember your language choice. See our <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy> for details.

gift-packaging.intro: Wooden gift and product packaging boxes — magnetic closure, hinged lid, and sliding-lid options with debossed branding.

watch-jewelry.intro: Velvet/microfiber-lined watch and jewelry presentation boxes with concealed hinges and lockable options.

tea-coffee.tagline: Compartment boxes for tea bags, pods, and loose leaf
tea-coffee.intro: Compartmented boxes for tea bags, coffee pods, and loose leaf — with optional acrylic windows and dividers.

wine-whisky.tagline: Single-bottle to magnum and decanter sets
wine-whisky.intro: Single-bottle, double-bottle, magnum, and decanter-set boxes — pine, oak, walnut, paulownia.

kitchen-dining.tagline: Bread bins, salt cellars, cutlery and serving caddies
kitchen-dining.intro: Bread bins, salt cellars, cutlery boxes, condiment caddies, and serving trays for kitchen and dining.

garden-seed.tagline: Planters, seed storage, and garden tool crates
garden-seed.intro: Planters, seed storage, and garden tool crates — outdoor-finish wooden boxes built to last.

storage.tagline: Drawer organizers, crates, and stackable boxes
storage.intro: Drawer organizers, storage crates, and stackable boxes — modular wooden organizer systems.

hinged.intro: Boxes with brass or steel hinges, optional clasps and locks — built for daily opening.

sliding-lid.intro: Classic sliding-lid construction — ideal for gifts, crafts, and retail-ready packaging.

drawer.intro: Multi-tier drawer cabinets and pull-out organizer boxes — solid wood and ply construction.

magnetic.tagline: Hidden magnetic closure — clean look, premium feel
magnetic.intro: Hidden magnetic closure — clean exterior look with a satisfying premium snap.

with-lock.tagline: Lockable boxes with key or combination
with-lock.intro: Lockable wooden boxes with brass key lock, combination lock, or hidden cam lock.

paulownia.tagline: Lightweight, dimensionally stable, easy to engrave
paulownia.intro: Lightweight, dimensionally stable paulownia — great for shipping economy and laser engraving.

pine.intro: Affordable softwood with clean grain — easy to paint and stain, perfect for rustic and farmhouse looks.

bamboo.intro: Sustainable, hard, and modern — bamboo grows fast, harvests sustainably, and looks beautiful.

acacia.intro: Rich grain, hard and durable acacia — premium kitchen, dining, and gift boxes with character.

walnut.intro: Chocolate-brown hardwood — high-end watch, jewelry, and gift presentation boxes.

meta.title: Capabilities — CHIC
meta.description: CNC routing, laser engraving, hot foil, screen print, kiln drying, finishing and packing — modern equipment and a strict QC system for wholesale and OEM wooden box programs.
meta.ogDescription: CNC routing, laser, hot foil, screen print, kiln drying, finishing and packing — wholesale and OEM wooden box production.

capabilities.intro: Modern equipment, experienced operators, and a strict quality system — designed for wholesale and OEM customers.

manufacturing.d: CNC routers, sliding panel saws, edge banders, finishing booths.

qc.d: Multi-stage inspection from incoming materials to pre-shipment.

oem.d: Branding, packaging, and full design support for private label.

capacity.d: Stable monthly output with predictable lead times.

engineering.d: CAD review, prototyping, and DFM suggestions.

logistics.d: Reliable export packing and worldwide shipping coordination.

productDetail.inquiryDescription: Send us your specs — quantity, dimensions, branding, and any custom requirements. We respond within 24 hours with a quote and lead time confirmation.
